root_cause: Between 19:45 and 20:05 UTC on 30 Nov 2016, customers located primarily in the Asia-Pacific geographic region may have experienced failures attempting to connect to a subset of Azure customer resources and platform services.
root_cause_key_terms: Azure customer resources and platform services
impact: Between 19:45 and 20:05 UTC on 30 Nov 2016, customers located primarily in the Asia-Pacific geographic region may have experienced failures attempting to connect to a subset of Azure customer resource
service: Azure customer resources and platform services
